name: Different Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil and chop the potatoes.
2. Add chopped onions, celery, salt, and pepper to the boiled potatoes.
3. Separate the egg yolks from the whites.
4. Chop the egg whites and add them to the potato mixture.
5. In a separate bowl, mix together the egg yolks, vinegar, mustard, and mayonnaise until well combined.
6. Add the yolk mixture to the potato mixture and stir thoroughly.
7. If the salad is too thick, gradually add more vinegar until it reaches the desired consistency.
8. Pour the sauce over the potato mixture.
